description: Observation hooks for skill evolution — records skill usage and session outcomes

hooks.prompt: Check if any Skill tool was used in this session. If so, evaluate whether each skill completed successfully, partially, or failed based on the conversation. For each skill used, append a complete observation record to .claude/skill-evolution/observations.jsonl. Each record should be a single JSON line with fields: timestamp (ISO 8601), sessionId, skillName, pluginName (if known), taskSummary (brief description of what the skill was used for), outcome (completed|partial|failed|abandoned), errors (array of error descriptions), userCorrections (count of times user corrected the skill's output), notes (any relevant context). Create the .claude/skill-evolution/ directory if it does not exist. If no Skill tool was used in this session, do nothing.
